briefdescription.para: LFRC tasks.

detaileddescription.para: The NRF_LFRC_TASK_CANCELCAL task cannot be set when the calibration is not running.

briefdescription.para: LFRC events.
LFRC interrupts.
Number of measurement cycles used during calibration.
Power up control.
Function for retrieving the address of the specified task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
LFRC Task.

simplesect.para: Address of the requested task register.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the specified task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task to be activated.

briefdescription.para: Function for retrieving the address of the specified event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
LFRC Event.

simplesect.para: Address of the specified event register.

briefdescription.para: Function for clearing the specified event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event to clear.

briefdescription.para: Function for retrieving the state of the specified event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event to be checked.
The event has been generated.
The event has not been generated.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling the specified interrupt.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be enabled. Use nrf_lfrc_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling the specified interrupt.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be disabled. Use nrf_lfrc_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking if the specified interrupts are enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be checked. Use nrf_lfrc_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for retrieving the state of pending interrupts.

detaileddescription.para: States of pending interrupt are saved as a bitmask. One set at particular position means that interrupt for event is pending.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Bitmask with information about pending interrupts. Use nrf_lfrc_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting current trimming value of the LFRCOSC.

simplesect.para: Returned value is in 2's complement format, 1.4% steps.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking status of analog module READY signal.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
The signal is logic 1.
The signal is logic 0.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking status of analog module SETTLED signal.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
The signal is logic 1.
The signal is logic 0.

briefdescription.para: Function for override the configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Configuration parameters.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting measurement cycle count length used while calibration.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Number of cycles.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting lower trim limit.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
TRIM limit value.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting higher trim limit.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
TRIM limit value.

briefdescription.para: Function for reading calibration results.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Result number.

briefdescription.para: Function for reading number of cycles when the CAL signal is high.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for power control set.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Power up control.

briefdescription.para: Symbol indicating whether double tail current is present.
Symbol indicating whether continuous tail bias is present.
Symbol indicating whether CAL retention is present.
Symbol indicating whether spare general purpose configuration is present.
Symbol indicating whether INTPEND register is present.
Symbol indicating whether the Low Frequency Clock calibration is present.
Symbol indicating whether the PWRUPCTRL register is present.
Symbol indicating whether the STATUSTRIM register is present.
Symbol indicating whether the STATUSANA register is present.
Symbol indicating whether the CONFIG.CFG register is present.
Symbol indicating whether the CAL.TRIMLIMITLO register is present.
Symbol indicating whether the CAL.TRIMLIMITHI register is present.
Symbol indicating whether the CAL.RESULT register is present.
Symbol indicating whether the CAL.LENGTH register is present.
Symbol indicating whether the CAL.NHI register is present.
Hardware access layer for managing the Low Frequency 32 KHz RC Oscillator (LFRC).
